cases.description: Runs auth status check before attempting to query
cases.prompt: Ask my NotebookLM notebook: what are the key findings?
expectations: Runs `python run.py auth_manager.py status` before querying
If not authenticated, runs `python run.py auth_manager.py setup`
Always uses the run.py wrapper — never calls scripts directly

cases.description: Queries a specific notebook by library ID
cases.prompt: Ask my API docs notebook: how does authentication work?
expectations: Runs `python run.py ask_question.py --question '...' --notebook-id api-docs`
If notebook ID is unknown, checks library with `notebook_manager.py list` first
Uses the run.py wrapper

cases.description: Queries a notebook using a direct URL
cases.prompt: Ask this notebook https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/abc123 what topics it covers
expectations: Runs `python run.py ask_question.py --question '...' --notebook-url 'https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/abc123'
Uses the run.py wrapper
Checks auth status first

cases.description: Uses Smart Add to discover notebook content before adding to library
cases.prompt: Add this notebook to my library: https://notebooklm.google.com/notebook/xyz789
expectations: First queries the notebook with 'What is the content of this notebook? What topics are covered?'
Uses the discovered information to fill --name, --description, and --topics
Runs `notebook_manager.py add` with complete metadata — not generic placeholders
Never guesses notebook content

cases.description: Asks follow-up questions after receiving a response with the follow-up reminder
cases.prompt: Use my NotebookLM to research how the payment system handles refunds
expectations: Runs initial ask_question.py query
After receiving the answer + follow-up reminder, analyzes if gaps exist
Asks at least one follow-up question if the answer was incomplete
Synthesizes all answers before responding to the user
Does not immediately respond after the first answer

cases.description: Does not trigger for Jupyter notebook requests
cases.prompt: Create a Jupyter notebook for data analysis with pandas
expectations: Does NOT run auth_manager.py or any NotebookLM scripts
Does NOT navigate to notebooklm.google.com
Treats this as a standard Jupyter notebook task

cases.description: Does not trigger for generic documentation questions
cases.prompt: Can you explain how OAuth works?
expectations: Does NOT run any NotebookLM scripts
Answers from general knowledge
Does NOT ask the user for a notebook URL
